home.desc: Discover Fairhaven Property Group's real estate investments and property management for dynamic growth.
home.body_text:
# Architects of Lasting


# Transformation


# What we do

DISCRETIONARY PROPERTY FUNDS · PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AND OPTIMISATION · DEAL SOURCING


### Discretionary Fund Management

Introducing Fairhaven Property Group’s inaugural discretionary fund management portfolio, tailored for wholesale investors in pursuit of dynamic growth. We project returns yielding 15%* net profit after tax and fees annually. This fund is crafted for wholesale investors with a moderate risk appetite, employing a dynamic strategy centered on acquiring and enhancing high-potential land and commercial properties for substantial medium to long-term gains. It provides investors with a strategic opportunity not only for diversification and resilience in their portfolios but also for broad exposure across various sectors within New Zealand's vibrant real estate market.

We excel in dealflow and deal sourcing through our extensive network, market insights, and strategic partnerships across New Zealand, Australia, Singapore, Malaysia, and Southeast Asia. Actively monitoring the market, we identify high-potential real estate and investment opportunities, often securing deals before they go public. With rigorous due diligence and financial analysis, we ensure each opportunity aligns with our investors' goals. This proactive, data-driven approach enables us to offer exclusive, high-return investments, delivering well-structured deals that generate long-term value and growth for our partners.


### Deal Sourcing


### Property Management and Optimization

At Fairhaven Property Group, we go above and beyond traditional real estate investments by optimizing properties for maximum returns. Our dedicated team of professionals takes a proactive approach to property management, employing comprehensive strategies that drive performance and enhance asset value. From rent optimization and cost reduction to efficient operations, we leave no stone unturned in maximizing returns for our investors. With our expertise in asset management, we ensure that properties under our care reach their full potential, resulting in increased occupancy rates and a superior experience for tenants and investors alike. Trust us to manage and optimize your investments for maximum profitability at Fairhaven Property Group.


## Be in the know

Want to stay updated on investment opportunities in New Zealand? Receive updates on ongoing projects, upcoming opportunities as well as invaluable market commentary. We will keep you in the know when it comes to New Zealand’s real estate Market. If you're a tenant or have an enquiry regarding one of our properties, contact our property management team directly .


#### Important Disclaimer

Fairhaven Property Group specializes in real estate investment opportunities across New Zealand, tailored specifically for wholesale investors as defined by the Financial Markets Authority (FMA). Our focus is on delivering strategic and high-value investment solutions, supported by our extensive market knowledge and expertise.

At Fairhaven, we are committed to transparency and integrity in all our dealings. We invite wholesale investors to explore our curated portfolio, designed to offer substantial growth and value. Please note, our offerings are not available to retail investors.

For more information on what constitutes a wholesale investor, please visit the FMA's guidelines .

Individuals who are tax residents outside of New Zealand are hereby advised to procure legal counsel or engage with the appropriate regulatory authority to assess their eligibility for investing with our entity, contingent upon their residency status.

Fairhaven Property Group makes no representations or warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy or completeness of the information contained herein. All information is provided “as is,” without warranty of any kind. The contents of this page may be restricted by law in certain jurisdictions. It is the responsibility of any person viewing this page to inform themselves of, and to observe, any such restrictions.

The information above is subject to the laws and regulations of New Zealand.

# Architects of Lasting


# Transformation


# What we do

RESIDENTIAL DEVELOPMENT FUNDS · COMMERCIAL PROPERTY FUNDS · BRIDGE FINANCING · PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AND OPTIMISATION


### Residential Development Fund

Immerse yourself in the burgeoning residential market of Christchurch, a city ripe with growth and potential. This fund offers more than just an investment; it's an invitation to be an integral part of Christchurch's flourishing future. Our strategy is meticulously crafted to focus on high-value investments in this dynamic market, projecting impressive returns between 30-40%. These projections are fluid, adapting to the ever-changing real estate landscape, ensuring that our strategies are always aligned with the best interests of our investors.

Speak to us today about a Residential Development Fund


### Commercial Property Fund

Expand your investment spectrum with our versatile Commercial Property Fund. This fund spans a vast array of commercial properties, each selected for its potential to bolster and balance your portfolio. Our tactical approach is engineered to not only withstand but thrive amidst market fluctuations. We aim for steady, substantial growth, with anticipated returns in the range of 20-28%. This fund represents a strategic avenue for investors seeking diversification and resilience in their portfolios.

Speak to us today about a Commercial Property Fund


### Bridge Financing

Explore the dynamic field of real estate investment with our Bridge Financing Strategy. This approach provides investors with returns on their capital while offering nimble financing solutions in contrast to the slower, traditional bank lending methods. With a focus on financing businesses backed by ample collateral (50% LVR), we offer competitive rates, currently at 10% p.a., periodically adjusting as the market evolves. This strategy ensures that our practices are consistently aligned with the best interests of our investors and the market's pulse. Join us in this journey, where we adeptly balance security and profitability in the ever-changing landscape of real estate investment.

Speak to us today about Bridge Financing

about-us.title: About Us | Explore Our Expertise — Fairhaven Property Group
about-us.desc: Learn more about Fairhaven Property Group's approach in creating value for investors through strategic real estate investments and community engagement.
about-us.body_text:
# About us


### Where Opportunity and Expertise Converge

Focusing on Results that matter


# Our mission

Our mission is to create exceptional value for investors by identifying and unlocking opportunities in overlooked and underserved markets. With a focus on strategic investments and leveraging decades of expertise in property management, acquisitions, and asset optimization, we deliver sustainable growth and long-term returns. By navigating less nimble markets with agility and insight, we build portfolios that drive both investor success and community resilience and long-term yield.


## Our approach

At Fairhaven Property Group, we take a holistic approach to real estate investment. We combine rigorous market research, comprehensive due diligence, and astute investment strategies to identify high-potential properties and markets. Our team of experienced professionals meticulously analyzes market trends, economic indicators, and local dynamics to make informed investment decisions. We believe in the power of collaboration and establishing long-term partnerships. We actively engage with stakeholders, including investors, community members, and local authorities, to ensure our investments align with the needs and aspirations of the communities we serve.


## Our commitment

At Fairhaven Property Group, we are committed to transparency, integrity, and delivering exceptional value to our investors. We meticulously manage risks, employ proactive asset optimization strategies, and adhere to strict regulatory compliance to protect our investors' interests. We believe in long-term sustainable growth and focus on building strong relationships with our investors and partners. We strive to foster trust, provide regular updates, and ensure open lines of communication.


## Our expertise

Propelling Fairhaven Property Group forward is Petrus Yen. His decade of experience in successfully managing his family office’s real estate assets provides him with unparalleled expertise. His forward-thinking leadership and exceptional ability to identify promising opportunities is integral to the success of Fairhaven Property Group. Leading a skilled team adept at analyzing broad market trends and specific economic indicators, Petrus ensures every investment decision is both well-informed and strategically robust. This rigorous approach sets Fairhaven Property Group apart, reflecting our commitment to excellence in all aspects of our operations.


## Contact us

We invite you to explore our website to learn more about our investment offerings. Should you have any questions or inquiries, please don't hesitate to reach out to our dedicated team. We look forward to partnering with you and embarking on a successful real estate investment journey together.

discretionary-fund.title: Discretionary Fund | Maximize Your Investment — Fairhaven Property Group
discretionary-fund.desc: Explore Fairhaven's Discretionary Fund for dynamic growth and flexible investment tailored for wholesale and institutional investors.
discretionary-fund.body_text:
### Introducing


## Fairhaven Discretionary


# Fund Management


#### Tailored for wholesale investors, institutional investors and family offices seeking dynamic growth, flexibility and solid performance


## Fund Summary

Fairhaven Property Group’s inaugural Discretionary Fund Management portfolio represents a consolidation of select commercial properties, each chosen for its potential to deliver high yields to our investors. Targeting an approximate 14 - 15%* net profit per annum, our aim is provide investors with unparallel growth and value.  At its inception, the fund's strategy focuses on multiple leveraged acquisitions with a disciplined approach to maintaining a 50% loan-to-value ratio for our medium to long-term investments. Leveraging on our fund managers expertise, we are committed to meticulously balancing and expanding the portfolio, adhering to our stringent investment criteria that is geared towards growth.


#### Targeted Returns


### 14-15%*

IRR p.a


#### Fund Lifetime


## 10 years


#### Minimum Investment


## 1m

*This opportunity is available exclusively to "Wholesale Investors" as defined in clauses 3(2) and 3(3) of Schedule 1 of the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013, or to individuals who qualify under an exemption specified in Schedule 1 of the Act.

Please note, this page is provided for informational purposes only and is not intended as an Investment Memorandum. It should not be the sole basis for any investment decision.

We aim for a target average pre-tax annual return over a 10-year period, calculated from anticipated cash distributions and the projected growth in net asset value, without accounting for potential future selling expenses. The methodology behind the return calculation, along with the risks associated with the investment and its returns, are detailed in the Information Memorandum

with the option to extend for 3 more


# Acquisition Profile

Fairhaven Property Group meticulously selects properties in alignment with the strategic goals of our discretionary fund management portfolio through a rigorous and discerning process. While these identified properties exemplify the type of investments we aim for, the following properties may or may not have been secured under contract at this time. This list is intended to provide a representative overview of the investment opportunities we are exploring, as outlined by our clearly established investment criteria.


### Commercial property with 12.17% yield p.a.

Location: Dunedin, Otago

Section Size: 9389 sqm

Building GLA: 15535 sqm

At the heart of Dunedin’s central business district, this property stands emerges as a leading venue for commerce, home to large retail entities and offices. It boasts a parking amenity capable of supporting a substantial number of vehicles. The property regularly draws a large crowd of patrons each day, positioning it as a vibrant center for trade and activity.


### Commercial property with 11.67% yield p.a.

Location: Christchurch, Canterbury

Section Size: 66,989 sqm

Building Size: 27,441 sqm

Situated in a vibrant area of Christchurch, this shopping center features major vendors such as Countdown and The Warehouse among its diverse array of over 40 stores. The center also offers a substantial food court with 300 seats and ample parking space. Its strategic location makes it a central hub for both commerce and social gatherings in the community.


### Student Accomodation with 13.76% yield p.a.

Location: Wellington, Wellington

Section Size: 2606 sqm

Building GLA: 9333 sqm

This property serves as a dedicated student accommodation facility in Wellington, designed to support first-year university students. It offers a range of living options, including single and twin-share studios, all furnished and heated for comfort. Additionally, it comes equipped with numerous amenities to ensure a fully furnished living space for students.


# Onboarding Process


# Be the first to know

We are currently finalizing the Information Memorandum. Kindly leave your contact information to receive it at the earliest opportunity.

charity-initiatives.title: Charity Initiatives | Join Our Global Mission — Fairhaven Property Group
charity-initiatives.desc: Explore Fairhaven Property Group's charity initiatives supporting global education, healthcare, and environmental causes through B1G1 partnerships.
charity-initiatives.body_text:
# Charity Initiatives

Our giving initiatives through B1G1 are carefully chosen to align with our core values and mission. We focus on causes that promote education, healthcare, environmental conservation, and poverty alleviation. By supporting these initiatives, we strive to make a meaningful and sustainable difference in the lives of individuals and communities around the world.

Through our partnership with B1G1, we have witnessed the transformative power of collective giving. Together, we have been able to support initiatives such as building schools, providing clean water and sanitation facilities, supporting medical treatments, and empowering disadvantaged communities with education and vocational training.

At Fairhaven Property Group, we are proud to partner with B1G1 (Buy1Give1), a global giving initiative that allows us to make a meaningful impact in the world. Through our collaboration with B1G1, we have the opportunity to support charitable causes and create positive change in communities globally.

With B1G1, every business transaction we undertake has the power to make a difference. Through a unique giving model, we contribute a portion of our revenue to a wide range of impactful projects and charities. By doing so, we aim to address pressing social and environmental challenges and create a better future for all.

We firmly believe that businesses have a responsibility to give back and contribute to the greater good. By integrating giving into our everyday operations, we are able to create a positive ripple effect, inspiring others to join us in making a difference.

As part of our commitment to transparency and accountability, we regularly share updates and stories about the impact of our giving initiatives. Together, we can create a world where everyone has access to the resources and opportunities they need to thrive.


### Join us in our journey of giving and together, let's make a lasting impact that extends far beyond the boundaries of our business.

privacy-policy.title: Privacy policy | Protect Your Privacy Today — Fairhaven Property Group
privacy-policy.desc: Understand how Fairhaven Property Group collects, uses, and safeguards your personal data according to global privacy laws. Learn your rights and our data retention practices.
privacy-policy.body_text:
### Privacy Policy

Last Updated: 27/02/24

This Privacy Policy outlines how Fairhaven Property Limited ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, discloses, and protects your personal information or personal data. By accessing or using our services, you agree to the collection, use, and disclosure of your information in accordance with this policy.

1. Compliance Statement

We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal information is handled in a safe and responsible manner in accordance with the Privacy Act 2020 of New Zealand, the Privacy Act 1988 of Australia, the Personal Data Protection Act of Singapore, and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union.

We use your information for various purposes, including:

- Providing and improving our products and services.
- Communicating with you about updates, promotions, and important information.
- Analyzing user behavior to enhance user experience.
- Complying with legal obligations.
2. Information Collection

We collect information that you provide to us directly, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us. This may include but is not limited to your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide.

We also collect information automatically when you use our services, including but not limited to your IP address, device information, and browsing behavior.

3. Use of Information

Your personal information is used to provide, maintain, and improve our services; to communicate with you; to comply with legal obligations; and for other purposes with your consent.

4. Disclosure of Information

We may disclose your personal information to service providers, business partners, and law enforcement or government authorities if required by law or if it is necessary for the performance of our services.

5. International Transfers

Your personal information may be transferred to, and processed in, countries other than the country in which you reside. These countries may have data protection laws that are different from the laws of your country. We take steps to ensure that your personal information is protected and that transfers comply with applicable law.

6. Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.

7. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have certain rights under data protection laws, including the right to access, correct, delete, or transfer your personal data, and the right to restrict or object to certain processing of your data.

8. Data Retention

We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services to you, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on our website and updating the "effective date" at the top of this policy.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at hello@fairhavenproperty.co.nz .

careers.title: Careers | Join Our Team Now — Fairhaven Property Group
careers.desc: Explore exciting career opportunities at Fairhaven Property Group. Join a dynamic team in real estate investment to drive growth and foster positive change.
careers.body_text:
# Join our team


### Are you passionate about real estate and investment management ?

Fairhaven Property Group offers exciting career opportunities for professionals looking to contribute to the growth and success of our dynamic company. As a member of our team, you will play a crucial role in shaping the future of real estate investment while working in a collaborative and innovative environment. Join us and be part of a team that is committed to unlocking the potential of communities, driving positive change, and fostering professional growth. Explore our current job openings and submit your application here .


#### Our roles:


# Investor Relations Associate


#### Position Overview

As an Investor Relations Associate at Fairhaven Property Group, you will play a vital role in supporting our Investor Relations Manager in building and maintaining strong relationships with our investors. This entry-level position requires excellent people skills, a comfort with cold calling and reaching out to new contacts, and the ability to manage various tasks as directed by the Investor Relations Manager. You will work closely with our CRM and assist in reporting, communications, and other investor-related activities. This is a hybrid role, requiring occasional office meetings and offering flexibility in your work environment.

Location: Hybrid - Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia / Remote


#### Responsibilities

1. Investor Support:

- Assist the Investor Relations Manager with all investor relations activities, providing exceptional service and addressing inquiries and concerns.
- Develop and maintain strong relationships with existing and potential investors, fostering long-term partnerships.
- Manage investor communications, including newsletters, reports, and updates on fund performance and investment opportunities.
- Assist in organizing investor events, conferences, and meetings to promote investor engagement and cultivate a sense of community.
2. Outreach and Engagement:

- Conduct cold calls and reach out to new potential investors, introducing them to Fairhaven Property Group and our offerings.
- Work with the Investor Relations Manager to identify and engage with target investor segments, leveraging your communication skills to build connections.
3. Reporting and CRM Management:

- Manage reporting to the Investor Relations Manager, ensuring accurate and timely information is provided.
- Utilize our CRM (HubSpot preferred) to track and manage investor interactions, ensuring all data is up-to-date and accurately recorded.
4. Administrative Support:

- Assist with administrative tasks related to investor relations, including scheduling meetings, preparing presentations, and organizing documentation.
- Collaborate with internal teams to gather information and insights to support investor relations efforts.

#### Requirements

- Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
- Entry-level position; experience in sales or finance is a plus.
- Proficiency with CRM systems (HubSpot preferred) and Microsoft Office Suite.
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with diverse stakeholders.
- Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
- Adaptability and a willingness to learn and take on new challenges.
- This is a hybrid role, with occasional office meetings required.
- Strong people skills and the ability to understand and connect with investors are highly important.

#### We offer

- Fantastic career development options
- Rewards for initiative
- An autonomous, self-managing position.
This job description provides a general overview of the responsibilities and requirements for the Investor Relations Associate. Fairhaven Property Group is a growing organization, and as such, additional roles and responsibilities may arise based on the needs of the company. The successful candidate will have the opportunity to contribute to various aspects of the business, making a meaningful impact and supporting the overall success of Fairhaven Property Group.


### Apply for this position

To apply for this position, please submit you application, including a comprehensive CV and a tailored cover letter, to kate@loganhr.co.nz . Alternatively you may apply through here .

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further consideration. We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout the selection process.


# Property Manager


#### Position Overview

Fairhaven Property Group is a dynamic and rapidly growing real estate investment firm that specializes in property acquisition, development, and management. We are committed to creating sustainable and thriving communities through our innovative investment strategies and community-focused initiatives.

Fairhaven Property Group is seeking a part-time Property Manager to manage our property portfolio in Dunedin. Hours of work are 25 per week, although additional hours may be required during busy periods.  This is a self-managing role requiring exceptional time management, organisational, and customer service skills.

Location: Hybrid - Dunedin, Otago, New Zealand / Remote


#### Responsibilities

- Advertising and listing properties on the market, including marketing the property through various channels to attract potential tenants, using engaging descriptions and quality photographs to highlight the property's best features.
- Reviewing applications for tenancy including background checks and tenancy documentation. This includes evaluating tenant applications, conducting thorough background checks, and ensuring all tenancy agreements are complete and legally compliant.
- Generating detailed financial reports that track all income and expenses associated with the property, helping owners make informed decisions.
- Keeping the property management database (Palace) updated with all tenant information, financial transactions, and scheduled property activities to ensure efficient management.
- Regular inspections of the property are conducted to assess and document its condition, ensuring maintenance issues are promptly addressed to maintain its value and safety.
- Manages the scheduling and overseeing of repairs, including coordinating with contractors and ensuring quality workmanship, to maintain the property in excellent condition.

#### Requirements

- Proven industry experience and knowledge of the local
- Experience in accounts – payable and receivable.
- Strong office administration and computer skills.
- An exceptional work ethic and professional approach.
- Flexible, positive and have great relationship building skills.
- The ability to work to deadlines while producing a quality result

#### We offer

- Part time flexible hours
- Fantastic career development options
- Rewards for initiative
- An autonomous, self-managing position.
This job description provides a general overview of the responsibilities and requirements for the Property Manager role. Fairhaven Property Group is a growing organization, and as such, additional roles and responsibilities may arise based on the needs of the company. The successful candidate will have the opportunity to contribute to various aspects of the business, making a meaningful impact and supporting the overall success of Fairhaven Property Group.


### Apply for this position

To apply for this position, please submit you application, including a comprehensive CV and a tailored cover letter, to kate@loganhr.co.nz . Alternatively you may apply through here .

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further consideration. We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout the selection process.


# Executive Assistant


#### Position Overview

Fairhaven Property Group is seeking a highly motivated and organized individual to join our team as an Executive Assistant. As an Executive Assistant, you will provide comprehensive support to the Managing Partner and Investor Relations Managers, ensuring smooth operations and effective communication within the organization. Your role will be diverse and dynamic, requiring excellent organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

Location: Hybrid - Dunedin, Otago, New Zealand / Remote


#### Responsibilities

- Investor Onboarding : Assist with gathering details from investors to facilitate the onboarding process, including documentation, account setup, and communications. Maintain accurate and up-to-date investor records.
- Email and Correspondence Management : Monitor and manage the Managing Partner's and Investor Relations Managers' email accounts, draft responses, and prioritize incoming messages. Ensure timely and professional communication with internal and external stakeholders.
- Schedule and Calendar Management : Coordinate and manage schedules, appointments, and meetings for the Managing Partner and Investor Relations Manager. Prepare meeting agendas, documentation, and follow-up materials as necessary.
- Administrative Support : Provide general administrative support to the team, including organizing meetings, preparing reports and presentations, maintaining office supplies, and managing office equipment and facilities.
- Data Management : Assist in organizing and maintaining databases, tracking systems, and other relevant information to support effective investor relations and operational efficiency.
- Project Coordination : Collaborate with various departments to support and coordinate cross-functional projects. Assist in project management, including tracking deadlines, deliverables, and progress.
- Documentation and Filing : Maintain accurate and organized electronic and physical filing systems. Ensure proper documentation and filing of confidential and sensitive information.
- Additional Responsibilities : As a valued member of our team, you may be called upon to assist in various other tasks and responsibilities to support the smooth functioning of Fairhaven Property Group. These may include marketing support, event coordination, research projects, and other ad hoc duties as needed.

#### Requirements

- Proven experience as an Executive Assistant or similar administrative role.
- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.
- Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines.
- Attention to detail and a high level of accuracy in work.
- Proficient computer skills, including proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
- Ability to handle confidential and sensitive information with discretion.
- Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work collaboratively and effectively in a team environment.
- Adaptability and flexibility to navigate a fast-paced and dynamic work environment.
- Proactive and self-motivated with the ability to take initiative and solve problems.
- Knowledge of the real estate industry or experience in investor relations is a plus.
This job description provides a general overview of the responsibilities and requirements for the Executive Assistant role. Fairhaven Property Group is a growing organization, and as such, additional roles and responsibilities may arise based on the needs of the company. The successful candidate will have the opportunity to contribute to various aspects of the business, making a meaningful impact and supporting the overall success of Fairhaven Property Group.


### Apply for this position

To apply for this position, please submit you application, including a comprehensive CV and a tailored cover letter, to careers@fairhavenproperty.co.nz .

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further consideration. We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout the selection process.


# Financial Analyst


### Position Overview

The Financial Analyst role at Fairhaven Property Group offers an exceptional opportunity for individuals seeking to launch their careers in the real estate investment industry. As a key member of our dynamic team, you will contribute to our investment activities by conducting comprehensive financial analysis, assisting in investment valuation, and supporting data-driven decision-making processes. You will play a crucial role in conducting research, preparing insightful financial reports, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. This position provides valuable exposure to the real estate industry and the opportunity to develop strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Location: Hybrid - Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia / Remote


#### Responsibilities

- Demonstrate a proactive and self-driven attitude to take on new challenges and learn on the  job.
- Conduct thorough financial analysis, including financial modeling, investment valuation, and  risk assessment, to evaluate potential investment opportunities in various property sectors.
- Research and gather data from diverse sources to support financial analysis and  decision-making processes.
- Collaborate with team members to identify areas for process improvement, efficiency gains,  and innovative solutions.
- Assist in preparing financial reports and presentations to communicate findings, insights, and  recommendations to stakeholders.
- Continuously stay updated on industry trends, market conditions, and best practices in  financial analysis and real estate investment.
- Utilize available resources and seek out new learning opportunities to enhance skills and  knowledge in financial analysis and real estate investment.
- Proactively identify and address potential issues or risks in investment projects and propose  solutions.
- Contribute to the development and improvement of financial models, forecasting tools, and  investment evaluation processes.
- Support cross-functional teams and collaborate on special projects as assigned.

#### Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to think critically and find creative  solutions.
- Excellent research skills and the ability to gather and analyze data from various sources.  - Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other financial analysis tools.
- Self-motivated and eager to learn, with a proactive approach to tackling challenges.
- Strong communication skills and the ability to effectively convey complex financial concepts.
- Detail-oriented and highly organized, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet  deadlines.
- Adaptability and flexibility to thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic work environment.
- Knowledge of real estate markets and investment principles is a plus.
At Fairhaven Property Group, we value resourcefulness, innovation, and a commitment to  excellence. We offer a competitive compensation package, including salary and benefits, along with ample opportunities for professional growth and development. This is an entry-level position ideal for individuals seeking to launch their careers in the real estate investment industry. To apply, please submit your resume and a cover letter outlining your qualifications, highlighting your resourcefulness and ability to adapt in challenging situations.


### Apply for the Position

To apply for this position, please submit you application, including a comprehensive CV and a tailored cover letter, to careers@fairhavenproperty.co.nz .

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further consideration. We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout the selection process.


# Investor Relations Manager


### Position Overview

As the Investor Relations Manager at Fairhaven Property Group, you will play a critical and dynamic role in building and maintaining strong relationships with our investors. This position requires expertise in investor relations, branding, marketing, and the ability to contribute to various aspects of our growing organization. You will have the opportunity to work closely with investors in South East Asia and Oceania, leveraging your regional knowledge and networks to support our strategic goals. As a member of our small and collaborative team, you will also be expected to wear multiple hats and contribute to various initiatives beyond investor relations.

Location: Hybrid - Dunedin, Otago, New Zealand / Remote


#### Responsibilities

1. Investor Relations:

- Serve as the primary point of contact for investors in South East Asia and Oceania, providing exceptional service and addressing their inquiries and concerns.
- Develop and maintain strong relationships with existing and potential investors, ensuring their satisfaction and fostering long-term partnerships.
- Coordinate and facilitate investor communications, including newsletters, reports, and updates on fund performance and investment opportunities.
- Organize investor events, conferences, and meetings to promote investor engagement and cultivate a sense of community.
2. Branding and Marketing:

- Collaborate with the marketing team to develop and execute branding strategies that align with the company's vision and values.
- Contribute to the development of marketing materials, presentations, and collateral to effectively communicate the value proposition and differentiate Fairhaven Property Group in the market.
- Assist in ensuring consistent messaging and branding across all investor-facing communications, both online and offline.
- Support market research and analysis efforts to identify target investor segments, market trends, and competitive positioning.
- Contribute to enhancing the online presence through website content, social media, and other digital marketing initiatives.
3. Reporting and Analytics:

- Prepare regular investor reports and presentations to provide insights into fund performance, market trends, and investment strategies.
- Utilize data and analytics to track and measure the effectiveness of investor relations and marketing initiatives.
- Monitor and analyze investor feedback, market trends, and competitor activities to identify opportunities for improvement and innovation.
4. Additional Responsibilities:

- Contribute to the development and implementation of investor relations and marketing strategies, leveraging your knowledge and experience in the South East Asia and Oceania markets.
- Assist in organizing and coordinating investor roadshows, conferences, and other investor-related events.
- Collaborate with internal teams to gather information and insights to support investor relations and marketing efforts.
- Contribute to the growth and development of the investor relations function within a small and dynamic team.
- Assist with other company-related tasks as needed, demonstrating flexibility and a willingness to contribute to various initiatives within a small team.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, such as finance, operations, and legal, to support the overall growth and success of Fairhaven Property Group.
- Provide insights and recommendations based on industry knowledge and investor feedback to support strategic decision-making across the organization.
- Stay updated on industry trends, regulations, and best practices related to investor relations and marketing, sharing relevant information with the team.
- Act as a brand ambassador for Fairhaven Property Group, promoting our values, culture, and investment opportunities to internal and external stakeholders.

#### Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field. MBA or CFA designation is a plus.
- Proven experience in investor relations, branding, marketing, and working with investors in South East Asia and Oceania, preferably within the financial services or real estate industry.
- Strong knowledge of investment products, capital markets, and investor relations best practices.
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with diverse stakeholders.
- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to effectively convey complex investment concepts to both sophisticated and non-sophisticated investors.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data and trends to inform decision-making.
- Proficiency in digital marketing tools, CRM systems, and Microsoft Office Suite.
- Detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced and collaborative environment.

### Apply for the Position

To apply for this position, please submit you application, including a comprehensive CV and a tailored cover letter, to careers@fairhavenproperty.co.nz .

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further consideration. We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout the selection process.

This is a hybrid role, requiring occasional office meetings and offering flexibility in your work environment.

Location: Hybrid - Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia / Remote

- Assist the Investor Relations Manager with all investor relations activities, providing exceptional service and addressing inquiries and concerns.
- Develop and maintain strong relationships with existing and potential investors, fostering long-term partnerships.
- Manage investor communications, including newsletters, reports, and updates on fund performance and investment opportunities.
- Assist in organizing investor events, conferences, and meetings to promote investor engagement and cultivate a sense of community.
2. Outreach and Engagement:

- Conduct cold calls and reach out to new potential investors, introducing them to Fairhaven Property Group and our offerings.
- Work with the Investor Relations Manager to identify and engage with target investor segments, leveraging your communication skills to build connections.

# Investor Relations Manager


### Position Overview

As the Investor Relations Manager at Fairhaven Property Group, you will play a critical and dynamic role in building and maintaining strong relationships with our investors. This position requires expertise in investor relations, branding, marketing, and the ability to contribute to various aspects of our growing organization. You will have the opportunity to work closely with investors in South East Asia and Oceania, leveraging your regional knowledge and networks to support our strategic goals. As a member of our small and collaborative team, you will also be expected to wear multiple hats and contribute to various initiatives beyond investor relations.

Location: Hybrid - Dunedin, Otago, New Zealand / Remote


#### Responsibilities

1. Investor Relations:

- Serve as the primary point of contact for investors in South East Asia and Oceania, providing exceptional service and addressing their inquiries and concerns.
- Develop and maintain strong relationships with existing and potential investors, ensuring their satisfaction and fostering long-term partnerships.
- Coordinate and facilitate investor communications, including newsletters, reports, and updates on fund performance and investment opportunities.
- Organize investor events, conferences, and meetings to promote investor engagement and cultivate a sense of community.
2. Branding and Marketing:

- Collaborate with the marketing team to develop and execute branding strategies that align with the company's vision and values.
- Contribute to the development of marketing materials, presentations, and collateral to effectively communicate the value proposition and differentiate Fairhaven Property Group in the market.
- Assist in ensuring consistent messaging and branding across all investor-facing communications, both online and offline.
- Support market research and analysis efforts to identify target investor segments, market trends, and competitive positioning.
- Contribute to enhancing the online presence through website content, social media, and other digital marketing initiatives.
3. Reporting and Analytics:

- Prepare regular investor reports and presentations to provide insights into fund performance, market trends, and investment strategies.
- Utilize data and analytics to track and measure the effectiveness of investor relations and marketing initiatives.
- Monitor and analyze investor feedback, market trends, and competitor activities to identify opportunities for improvement and innovation.
4. Additional Responsibilities:

- Contribute to the development and implementation of investor relations and marketing strategies, leveraging your knowledge and experience in the South East Asia and Oceania markets.
- Assist in organizing and coordinating investor roadshows, conferences, and other investor-related events.
- Collaborate with internal teams to gather information and insights to support investor relations and marketing efforts.
- Contribute to the growth and development of the investor relations function within a small and dynamic team.
- Assist with other company-related tasks as needed, demonstrating flexibility and a willingness to contribute to various initiatives within a small team.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, such as finance, operations, and legal, to support the overall growth and success of Fairhaven Property Group.
- Provide insights and recommendations based on industry knowledge and investor feedback to support strategic decision-making across the organization.
- Stay updated on industry trends, regulations, and best practices related to investor relations and marketing, sharing relevant information with the team.
- Act as a brand ambassador for Fairhaven Property Group, promoting our values, culture, and investment opportunities to internal and external stakeholders.

#### Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field. MBA or CFA designation is a plus.
- Proven experience in investor relations, branding, marketing, and working with investors in South East Asia and Oceania, preferably within the financial services or real estate industry.
- Strong knowledge of investment products, capital markets, and investor relations best practices.
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with diverse stakeholders.
- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to effectively convey complex investment concepts to both sophisticated and non-sophisticated investors.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data and trends to inform decision-making.
- Proficiency in digital marketing tools, CRM systems, and Microsoft Office Suite.
- Detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced and collaborative environment.

### Apply for the Position

To apply for this position, please submit you application, including a comprehensive CV and a tailored cover letter, to careers@fairhavenproperty.co.nz .

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further consideration. We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout the selection process.

# Property Manager


#### Position Overview

Fairhaven Property Group is a dynamic and rapidly growing real estate investment firm that specializes in property acquisition, development, and management. We are committed to creating sustainable and thriving communities through our innovative investment strategies and community-focused initiatives.

Fairhaven Property Group is seeking a part-time Property Manager to manage our property portfolio in Dunedin. Hours of work are 25 per week, although additional hours may be required during busy periods.  This is a self-managing role requiring exceptional time management, organisational, and customer service skills.

Location: Hybrid - Dunedin, Otago, New Zealand / Remote


#### Responsibilities

- Advertising and listing properties on the market, including marketing the property through various channels to attract potential tenants, using engaging descriptions and quality photographs to highlight the property's best features.
- Reviewing applications for tenancy including background checks and tenancy documentation. This includes evaluating tenant applications, conducting thorough background checks, and ensuring all tenancy agreements are complete and legally compliant.
- Generating detailed financial reports that track all income and expenses associated with the property, helping owners make informed decisions.
- Keeping the property management database (Palace) updated with all tenant information, financial transactions, and scheduled property activities to ensure efficient management.
- Regular inspections of the property are conducted to assess and document its condition, ensuring maintenance issues are promptly addressed to maintain its value and safety.
- Manages the scheduling and overseeing of repairs, including coordinating with contractors and ensuring quality workmanship, to maintain the property in excellent condition.

#### Requirements

- Proven industry experience and knowledge of the local
- Experience in accounts – payable and receivable.
- Strong office administration and computer skills.
- An exceptional work ethic and professional approach.
- Flexible, positive and have great relationship building skills.
- The ability to work to deadlines while producing a quality result

#### We offer

- Part time flexible hours
- Fantastic career development options
- Rewards for initiative
- An autonomous, self-managing position.

Fairhaven Property Group is a growing organization, and as such, additional roles and responsibilities may arise based on the needs of the company.
